mapper.insert: insert into kh_user_symptom_track (user_symptom_ids, user_id, symptoms_name, during_time, degree, happen_time, notes) values ( #{userSymptomIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{symptomsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{duringTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{degree,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{happenTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
update kh_user_symptom_track set
user_symptom_ids = #{userSymptomIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
symptoms_name = #{symptomsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
during_time = #{duringTime,jdbcType=INTEGER},
degree = #{degree,jdbcType=INTEGER},
happen_time = #{happenTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
notes = #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, user_symptom_ids, user_id, symptoms_name, during_time, degree, happen_time, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_user_symptom_track where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id, user_symptom_ids, user_id, symptoms_name, during_time, degree, happen_time, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_user_symptom_track where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
